{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230112178221D6723E28D33967A2"}"},"total":195},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614066780261729049","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容很有趣，有很多世界观的融合，林逸和林逸的互动都很好玩Ｏ(≧▽≦)Ｏ"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772791520,"group_id":"7586541876979715096","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7D2QooSrYV/7/UQe5QgCuw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"83640240005","user_name":"常安喜乐0"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"83640240005","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1704021999,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586541876979715096","book_info":{"abstract":"【人格分裂，搞笑，类聊天群，我的世界、海贼、火影、宝可梦，漫威、还可以加。】
拜托了另一个我！
当你遇到敌人打不过了怎么办？当然是摇人啊！
俗话说，求人不如求己，林逸决定，叫穿越到其他世界的人格过来帮忙。
海贼世界，海军林逸遭遇香克斯，直面神避。
神避我不避，我比神牛逼，这叫基岩，懂不懂基岩方块的含金量啊。
火影世界，忍者？忍术？我三色霸气主打一手力大砖飞。
宝可梦世界，你想什么呢？宝可梦世界是一个美好的乌托邦世界，想看黑深残？抱歉，这里没有。
靠北啦！凭什么他能去宝可梦世界享福？我们都是林逸凭什么去享福的不能是我们？
不公平，不公平，重新分配，重新分配！
随着回归的人格越来越多，林逸本尊发现自己解锁的模组越来越多。直到，连通各个世界通道开启。不同宇宙的林逸可以前往其他的世界，魔丸降世。
各个宇宙的人忽然发现，这个叫林逸的家伙，居然不是一个人，而是一群人！还是一群神经病。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2fcc5a882c9442bc1e9fece9efc1a4ee","author":"路过的一只猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7586541876979715096","book_name":"万界，空岛生存？不，是万界同穿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":368,"name":"火影","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=368&name=火影&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586541884613329432","read_count":"49695","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"380284"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"176","tags":"动漫衍生,诸天万界,火影,同人,搞笑轻松,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9de2ef2e694f528be1155204d7d34d27~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383537&x-signature=aY%2BzrN2jnVX%2BYf4oQYDlTM1j72o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2674432496659160","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"172"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230112178221D6723E28D33967A2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"
